name: CMP_TCS_CRITERIA_TAG_INFO
description: Table holds Comp Tcs Criteria Tag records.

columns.Name: CRITERIA_TAG_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: CRITERIA_DEF_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to CMP_TCS_CRITERIA_DEF table

columns.Name: CRITERIA_ID
columns.Comments: Earlier used as Foreign key to CMP_TCS_CRITERIA table

columns.Name: ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Item Id of the item in Compensation Item lov

columns.Name: ITEM_VALUE
columns.Comments: Column to decide which value of the item should be used to evaluate the Criteria.

columns.Name: TRANSFORM_OPERATOR
columns.Comments: Transform Operator

columns.Name: TRANSFORM_NUM_VALUE
columns.Comments: Number value in Transform input field for Monetary/Non-monetary items

columns.Name: COMPARISON_OPERATOR
columns.Comments: Value Operator

columns.Name: NUMERIC_COMPARISON_VALUE
columns.Comments: Number value in Value input field for Monetary/Non-monetary items

columns.Name: TEXT_COMPARISON_VALUE
columns.Comments: Text value in Value input field for Text items

columns.Name: DATE_COMPARISON_VALUE
columns.Comments: Date value in Value input field for Date items

columns.Name: OPEN_PARENTHESES
columns.Comments: Left Parenthesis value

columns.Name: CLOSE_PARENTHESES
columns.Comments: Right Parenthesis value

columns.Name: CONJUNCTION_OPERATOR
columns.Comments: Next Component value

columns.Name: CRITERIA
columns.Comments: Conditional Displat Sub-criterion

columns.Name: ORDR_NUM
columns.Comments: Order number of sub-criterion

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
